---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this working. Include API examples if possible:

```tsx
// Example usage
import { NewComponent } from '@annondeveloper/ui-kit'

<NewComponent variant="primary" size="md" />
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why they were not ideal.

## Component Category

- [ ] General-purpose component (`src/components/`)
- [ ] Domain-specific component (`src/domain/`)
- [ ] Core engine feature (`src/core/`)
- [ ] CLI tool enhancement
- [ ] Demo site / documentation
- [ ] Other

## Weight Tier Expectations

- [ ] Should work in Lite tier (minimal, no animations)
- [ ] Should work in Standard tier (full features)
- [ ] Should have Premium tier enhancements (aurora glow, physics)

## Additional Context

Any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar implementations.
